message:
Reusable key buffer, simplify classify_input, deduplicate error handling

- Replace per-access alloc/dealloc writeStringToMemory with persistent
  writeKeyToMemory buffer (eliminates 2 WASM calls per property access)
- Simplify getOwnPropertyDescriptor to delegate to get() via cache
- Extract classify_input pending scalar termination into single pre-check
  (was duplicated across 5 switch branches)
- Remove dead in_key_position variable from autocomplete_input
- Extract invalidResult() helper (was 3 identical error blocks)
- index.ts 920→900 lines, main.zig 874→827 lines, engine.wasm -123B
